CREATE TABLE test_arrays (id UInt32, arr1 Array(Int32), arr2 Array(Int32));
SELECT arrayAll(x -> x > 0, arr1) AS all_positive FROM test_arrays WHERE id = 1;
SELECT arrayAll((x, y) -> x + y > 5, arr1, arr2) AS pairs_above_five FROM test_arrays WHERE id = 3;
SELECT id, arrayAll(x -> x % 2 = 0, arr1) AS all_even FROM test_arrays WHERE arr1 IS NOT NULL;
SELECT arrayAll(x -> x > 0, arr1) AS all_positive FROM (SELECT arr1 FROM test_arrays WHERE id = 2);
SELECT id FROM test_arrays WHERE arrayAll(x -> x IN (4, 5, 6), arr2) = 1;
CREATE TABLE test_join (id UInt32, value Int32);
SELECT t.id, arrayAll(x -> x < value, arr1) AS all_less FROM test_arrays AS t JOIN test_join AS j ON t.id = j.id;
SELECT arrayAll(x -> x = 1, arr1) FROM (SELECT arr1 FROM test_arrays WHERE id IN (1, 3)) AS subquery;
SELECT id, arrayAll(x -> length(toString(x)) < 3, arr1) AS length_check FROM test_arrays;
SELECT arrayAll(x -> x > 10, arr1) AS none_gt_10 FROM (SELECT arr1 FROM test_arrays) AS nested_query;
SELECT id FROM test_arrays WHERE arrayAll(x -> x IS NOT NULL, arr1) = 1;
